## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Configure '...'
2. Run '...'
3. Send request '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or logs if available.

## Environment

- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04]
- **Node.js version**: [e.g., 20.x]
- **EVOKORE-MCP version**: [e.g., 2.0.0]
- **MCP Client**: [e.g., Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Claude Desktop]
- **Child servers active**: [e.g., github, filesystem, elevenlabs]

## Affected Component

- [ ] Core aggregator / JSON-RPC router
- [ ] Child server proxy (specify which server)
- [ ] Tool prefixing / namespace resolution
- [ ] HITL approval flow
- [ ] Hook scripts (damage-control, purpose-gate, session-replay, tilldone)
- [ ] Voice sidecar
- [ ] Configuration / environment variables
- [ ] Skills / documentation
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Logs / Error Output

```
Paste relevant logs, stack traces, or JSON-RPC error responses here.
```

If relevant, share your `mcp.config.json` (with secrets redacted):

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or related issues.
